marker.evidence_span: Fluorescent nanoparticles were prepared by replacing GAR with FITC (5 mg).
marker.ambiguity_note: Inferred that the optimal formulation (1:10 Drug:Polymer ratio) was used as the base for FITC labeling, as is common practice.

marker.evidence_span: GAR loaded NPs were radiolabeled with technetium-99m with >95% labeling efficiency
marker.ambiguity_note: Inferred that the optimal formulation (1:10 Drug:Polymer ratio) was used as the base for 99mTc labeling, as is common practice.
